name: cooperative-cooking-game
description: Three-player asymmetric cooperative browser cooking game.

scripts.pretypecheck: npm run build --workspace @cooking-game/shared && npm run build --workspace @cooking-game/recipe-schema && npm run build --workspace @cooking-game/test-utils
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @cooking-game/shared && npm run build --workspace @cooking-game/recipe-schema && npm run build --workspace @cooking-game/test-utils && npm run build --workspace @cooking-game/server && npm run build --workspace @cooking-game/client
